taxonomy: Heterolepis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. It is native to southern Africa. The genus Heterolepis is classified in the subfamily Cichorioideae. intro: Heterolepis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the silver crown or crown of thorns. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting overall health and well-being. Bioactive constituents of Heterolepis include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Heterolepis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
